headline: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 81.18, led by Jonathan Taylor, Chase Brown, and Javonte Williams. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the WR slot currently occupied by Parker Washington (64.8 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jonathan Taylor (97.6), Chase Brown (96.3), and Javonte Williams (81.0). That concentration gives Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, Parker Washington is the lowest C-AVI starter at 64.8. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 8 offensive players, leaving 2 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 70.72, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 8 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
